---
title: "Software"
about: 
  template: solana
---

I develop research software for scalable Bayesian inference and statistical machine learning. My packages are built to turn methodological research into reusable tools, with performance-critical components implemented in Rcpp.

## Packages

### Geometric Gaussian Processes on Manifolds

[FLGP](https://github.com/junhuihe2000/FLGP) is an R package for scalable Bayesian inference of heat kernel Gaussian processes on manifolds.

- Implements reduced-rank approximations for scalable Gaussian process inference.
- Targets large, high-dimensional scientific data while preserving intrinsic geometry.
- Written with Rcpp for performance-sensitive computation.

### Bayesian Model Selection

[ABMRS](https://github.com/junhuihe2000/ABMRS) is an R package for adaptive Bayesian multivariate spline knot inference.

- Supports Bayesian model selection with priors on model complexity.
- Designed for flexible multivariate spline modeling.
- Written with Rcpp for efficient computation.
